whyUs.title: Why Ocak Tourism?
whyUs.subtitle: Family-friendly tour organization in accordance with Islamic values
whyUs.f1Desc: Alcohol-free hotel options, family-friendly facilities and guaranteed halal cuisine for your peace of mind.
whyUs.f2Desc: Tour programs are planned according to prayer times. Access to nearby mosques is always provided.
whyUs.f3Desc: TURSAB licensed, insurance-covered organizations. Peaceful and safe family travels.
whyUs.f4Desc: Preferred by hundreds of families. A sincere and professional team respectful of Islamic sensitivities.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.subtitle: Family-friendly tour organizations in accordance with Islamic values
aboutPage.whoWeAreDesc: Our mission at Ocak Tourism is to offer quality and unforgettable travel experiences in accordance with Islamic sensitivities. Discover the beauties of the world with peace of mind through halal accommodation, prayer schedules and family-friendly environments.
aboutPage.missionDesc: To provide our customers with quality and reliable tour organizations in accordance with Islamic values, ensuring peaceful family travel experiences. We offer halal accommodation, prayer schedules and cultural richness together in every tour.
aboutPage.visionDesc: To be the most trusted Islamic tourism brand in Turkey, offering travel options in accordance with Islamic values worldwide, and to be the first choice of our customers.
aboutPage.v1Desc: We prioritize halal accommodation, halal food and prayer schedule in all our tours.
aboutPage.v2Desc: Travel with peace of mind with TURSAB licensed, insurance-covered organizations.
aboutPage.v3Desc: Boutique groups, intimate atmosphere. We create environments where families can feel comfortable.
aboutPage.v4Desc: Quality accommodation, expert guidance and carefully prepared programs.
aboutPage.r1Desc: We prefer alcohol-free hotel options, halal cuisine and family-friendly facilities in all our tours. Products containing pork are absolutely not available.
aboutPage.r2Desc: Our tour programs are planned according to prayer times. Nearby mosques are identified at every stop and sufficient time is allocated for prayers.
aboutPage.r3Desc: We offer an intimate atmosphere with small groups. We give personal attention to each guest.
aboutPage.r4Desc: Airfare, accommodation, transfers, guidance and all excursions are included in the price. Enjoy your trip without worrying about extra costs.
aboutPage.r5Desc: Experience unforgettable moments with professional Turkish-speaking guides who know the destinations well.
